November, 2017 S.O. 3695(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (2) of section 43 of the Food Safety and Standards Act, 2006 (34 of 2006), the Food Safety and Standards Authority of India hereby makes the following amendment in the notification number S.O. 97(E) dated the 10th January, 2017, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii) on 12th January, 2017, namely:— In TABLE-2, after serial number 12, the following entries shall be inserted in the respective columns, namely,— Serial No. Name of the Referral Food Laboratory All over
